title: thuja theophrasti
intro: Thuja theophrasti, also known as Eastern Arborvitae, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Korea. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Thuja theophrasti is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the lungs. It is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
